info.name: PCMS - Pharmacy Chain Management System
info.description:
# PCMS Backend API Collection

Pharmacy Chain Management System - Microservices Architecture.

## Stack
- Spring Boot 4.0.7 + Spring Cloud 2025.1.2 (Oakwood)
- JDK 21, Maven 3.9.16, MySQL 8.0
- Resilience4J 2.4.0, Eureka, Spring Cloud Config

## Services (17)
**Infrastructure:** config-server (8888), discovery-server (8761), api-gateway (8080)
**Core Business (12):** user (8081), branch (8082), catalog (8083), category (8084), supplier (8085), inventory (8086), customer (8087), order (8088), payment (8089), prescription (8090), notification (8091), report (8092)
**Extra:** customer-portal, pharmacist-workbench, ecom-ops, health-tools, mobile-bff

## Routing
All API access via API Gateway at `{{gateway}}` = http://localhost:8080/api/v1.
Service-direct URLs: see environment variables `{{xxxServiceUrl}}`.

## Auth Flow
1. POST /auth/login -> accessToken saved automatically by test script to `{{accessToken}}`
2. All subsequent requests include `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}` from collection auth.

## Environment
Import companion file `PCMS.postman_environment.json`.

item.name: 01 - user-service (UC01 Auth + UC02 Users + Dashboard + Audit)

exec: if (r.data && r.data.accessToken) { pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', r.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('accessToken', r.data.accessToken); }

item.name: Users - Create (Admin/CEO, server generates temp password)
Audit Logs - Search (filter by userId + action)

item.name: Inventory - List batches (current branch via X-Branch-Id)
Inventory - Get batches by branch + medicine
Inventory - Import (UC05) - creates batch with FIFO metadata
Inventory - Consume (called by order-service after paid)
Inventory - Transfer (UC05 AT2) atomic between branches
Inventory - Expiring within N days (BR03, NSF-03)
Inventory Outbox - Order paid (consume stock FIFO)
Inventory Outbox - Order cancelled (restore stock - BR06)
Customers - Add points (idempotent, called by payment-service BR07)
Orders - Create (UC06 main flow; auto-applies BR04 bulk discount)
Orders - Mark as PAID (called by payment-service; restores stock if was paid; BR07 loyalty)
Orders - Recompute (preview BR04 discount + stock check)
Saga Admin - Get saga instance + steps
Saga Admin - Get saga by aggregate
Saga Admin - List stuck sagas (>30min RUNNING)
